Our Story

From a Small Team to South East Queensland's Trusted Builder

Design Homes was founded in 2008 by Jason Smith, a builder with a vision to create homes that truly reflect the lifestyle and aspirations of Australian families.

Over the years, we've grown from a small team working on local projects in Brisbane to one of South East Queensland's most trusted residential builders. Our portfolio now spans custom homes, duplexes, townhouses, renovations, and commercial projects across Brisbane, Gold Coast, and Sunshine Coast.

“Every home we build is a reflection of our commitment to quality, innovation, and our client's vision. We don't just build houses — we create homes.”

Jason Smith

Managing Director

Our Values

The Principles That Guide Us

Integrity

We operate with complete transparency and honesty in every interaction with our clients.

Precision

Every detail matters. We apply meticulous attention to deliver flawless results.

Passion

We are genuinely passionate about creating beautiful homes that families love.

Innovation

We embrace modern building techniques and materials to deliver superior quality.

Excellence

We never settle for good enough. We push for the highest standard in everything.

Collaboration

We work closely with clients, architects, and trades to ensure seamless delivery.

Our Journey

Key Milestones in Our History

2008

Founded

Design Homes was established with a vision to build quality custom homes in Brisbane.

2012

Gold Coast Expansion

Expanded operations to the Gold Coast, delivering luxury builds along the coastline.

2016

50th Home

Celebrated our 50th completed home build, a major milestone for our growing team.

2020

Sunshine Coast

Extended our services to the Sunshine Coast region, covering all of South East Queensland.

2024

Award-Winning

Recognized by the HIA for excellence in residential construction and design innovation.
